agentic_ai_operations.name: Agent runs by period
agentic_ai_operations.description: Number of agent or skill runs grouped by hour, day, week, or month.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Cron runs by period
agentic_ai_operations.description: Number of scheduled agent runs grouped by hour, day, week, or month.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Cron success rate
agentic_ai_operations.description: Share of scheduled runs that complete successfully.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Cron duration p95
agentic_ai_operations.description: 95th percentile scheduled-run duration for capacity planning.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Active agents
agentic_ai_operations.description: Unique local agent/session/worker ids active in the selected period.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Tokens by period
agentic_ai_operations.description: Estimated input, output, and total token use grouped by time bucket.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Cost by period
agentic_ai_operations.description: Estimated model/tool cost grouped by time bucket.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Cost per successful run
agentic_ai_operations.description: Estimated spend divided by successful agent or cron runs.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Human acceptance rate
agentic_ai_operations.description: Share of reviewed outputs accepted without edits.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Human edit rate
agentic_ai_operations.description: Share of reviewed outputs that required edits.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Error rate
agentic_ai_operations.description: Share of agent or scheduled runs ending in error.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Category resource mix
agentic_ai_operations.description: Agent runs, cron runs, tokens, cost, and duration grouped by user-defined category.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Workflow repeatability
agentic_ai_operations.description: High-volume workflows with high acceptance and low failure rates.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Time saved estimate
agentic_ai_operations.description: Estimated human time saved by accepted or successful workflows.

agentic_ai_operations.name: Daily report delivery status
agentic_ai_operations.description: Whether the daily dashboard screenshot/report was produced and delivered through an approved channel.

real_estate.name: Lead response time
real_estate.description: Median time between a new lead and the first follow-up.

real_estate.name: Lead-to-appointment rate
real_estate.description: Percentage of new leads that book an appointment or showing.

real_estate.name: Human edit rate by workflow
real_estate.description: Share of agent outputs that required human edits before acceptance.

saas.name: Activation rate
saas.description: Percentage of trial signups reaching the activation event.

saas.name: Issue-to-PR cycle time
saas.description: Median time from issue creation to PR opened.

ecommerce.name: Average order value
ecommerce.description: Average order amount over the selected time window.

ecommerce.name: Support tickets per order
ecommerce.description: Support burden normalized by order volume.

agency_services.name: Proposal turnaround time
agency_services.description: Median time from inbound lead to proposal sent.

agency_services.name: Billable hours saved
agency_services.description: Estimated human hours saved by accepted agent workflows.

legal_finance_ops.name: Intake completion rate
legal_finance_ops.description: Percentage of started matter intakes that reach completion.

legal_finance_ops.name: Document review turnaround
legal_finance_ops.description: Median time from document received to review completed.
